currentLinkedIn.headline: VP of Sales at Ironclad | $0→$60M ARR | Enterprise · GTM · Team Builder
currentLinkedIn.about: I build enterprise sales machines. Fifteen years growing revenue teams from zero — I've taken two SaaS companies through $50M+ ARR milestones and I run lean, accountable teams that consistently exceed quota.

experience.title: VP of Sales
bullets: Grew enterprise ARR from $8M to $60M over three years; built sales team from 4 to 32 reps
Designed and implemented sales methodology that increased win rate from 18% to 31%
Closed three landmark Fortune 100 accounts worth $4.5M in combined ACV

experience.title: Director of Sales
bullets: Scaled North American sales from $5M to $25M ARR in 18 months; hired and ramped 15 AEs
Built SDR-to-AE pipeline programme that became company's standard GTM playbook
